svg.text: ECO-SIM: Giant Anteater × Termites - Myrmecophagy Clock
Foraging traits, brief mound visits, and thermal stress regulation

g.text: Anteaters traverse vast Cerrado to locate
termite mounds; visits are brief (1-2 mins)
to avoid soldier defenses and preserve the
nest for reuse. Prone to thermal overheating,
they go nocturnal in the intense dry season,
retreating to gallery forest (center) to cool.
